articles.title: Turkish Lira: Hawkish CBRT tone but lira risks ahead – ING
articles.summary: ING’s Frantisek Taborsky expects the Central Bank of Turkey (CBRT) to keep its policy rate at 37%, maintaining a tight stance and policy flexibility.
